case_title: MARCUS CAMPOS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: 0.00) SERVED JUN-01-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, MARCUS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ENDORSED COPIES OF SC-100 MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 5/18/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CAMPOS, MARCUS AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON APPLICATION FOR FEE WAIVER: FEE WAIVER IS GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-18-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MARCUS CAMPOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY MARGARET CROWLEY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO MARCUS CAMPOS ON 07/18/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - VACANT - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, MARCUS
